## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issue

- Closes #
- Or explain why no issue is linked:

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/Build/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated (or N/A)
- [ ] Public API changes documented
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

## Risk Assessment

- [ ] No breaking change
- [ ] Contains breaking change (explain below)
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes included (explain below)
- [ ] Known risks and mitigations documented below

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything specific reviewers should focus on.

## Breaking Changes (If Any)

List any breaking behavior/API changes and required migration steps.

## Local Commands Run

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
